title: taraxacum subpatens
intro: Taraxacum subpatens is a lesser-known species of the dandelion plant, characterized by its unique, more compact growth habit compared to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subpatens include its high levels of antioxidants, anti-inflammatory compounds, and vitamins, which contribute to its potential health benefits. Some of the reported health benefits of Taraxacum subpatens include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to help reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. Taraxacum subpatens can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, which allow for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for potential health benefits.
